items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised investment opinion on Albemarle from High Risk to Buy. Target price $225. Citi adjusted estimates to reflect lithium market outlook, analyzing that the market is underestimating Albemarle growth potential. Citi assessed that the possibility of the lithium market shift

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle (ALB) is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs, RBC Capital Markets said. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027, and
